ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pension_funds" (
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the record entry. */,
  "pfm_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the pension fund manager. */,
  "firm_name" TEXT /* Name of the pension fund management firm. */,
  "scheme_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the pension fund scheme. */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the pension fund scheme. */,
  "nav" REAL /* Net Asset Value (NAV) of the pension fund scheme. */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of the pension fund (e.g., equity, debt, balanced). */,
  "asset_allocation" TEXT /* Current asset allocation of the fund (e.g., percentage in stocks, bonds, cash). */,
  "performance_year" TEXT /* Performance metrics for each year. */,
  "risk_rating" TEXT /* Risk rating of the pension fund scheme. */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_date", "scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_managers" (
  "pfm_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the pension fund manager. */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the pension fund manager. */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the pension fund manager. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the pension fund manager. */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the pension fund manager. */,
  "experience_years" TEXT /* Number of years of experience in pension fund management. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pfm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user. */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user. */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user. */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user. */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the user's role. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user role. */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "scheme_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the pension fund scheme. */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric. */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric. */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id", "metric_date", "metric_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_allocations" (
  "scheme_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the pension fund scheme. */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date of the asset allocation. */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., stocks, bonds, cash). */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the asset in the fund. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id", "allocation_date", "asset_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "record_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the compliance record. */,
  "scheme_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the pension fund scheme. */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check. */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Regulation or standard being checked. */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant). */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the external data entry. */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the external data. */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the external data. */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data (e.g., market trend, regulatory change). */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value or details of the external data. */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)
